page_header.label: OPEN SOURCE
page_header.title: Build in the Open
page_header.description: All ZKIRA Pay code is open source and auditable.

items.label: TypeScript + Rust
items.title: zkira-pay/zkira
items.description: Main monorepo containing API, Pay app, Relayer, SDK, and cryptographic libraries

items.label: Rust
items.title: zkira-pay/ghost-registry
items.description: Stealth address registry program for on-chain privacy primitives

items.label: Rust
items.title: zkira-pay/conditional-escrow
items.description: Conditional escrow program with customizable unlock conditions

items.label: Rust
items.title: zkira-pay/multisig-escrow
items.description: Multi-signature escrow program for DAO treasury management

items.title: Fork Repository
items.description: Fork the repository you want to contribute to and clone it to your local machine.

items.title: Create Branch
items.description: Create a feature branch with a descriptive name for your changes.

items.title: Submit PR
items.description: Submit a pull request with a clear description of your changes and their purpose.

paragraphs: We are committed to providing a welcoming and inclusive environment for all contributors. Please review our Code of Conduct before participating in our community. Respectful collaboration and constructive feedback are the foundations of our development process.
All ZKIRA Pay code is released under the MIT License. You are free to use, modify, and distribute the code for any purpose, including commercial applications.
